recent_excerpts: Rapid7 argues most breaches result from visibility gaps in asset, identity, and attack path coverage rather than sophisticated exploits.
Rapid7 IR confirms active exploitation of CVE-2025-59718 — a 9.8-CVSS FortiGate SSO bypass — enabling attackers to gain persistent admin access on unpatched appliances.
Rapid7's May 12–13 summit agenda reveals industry pivot from reactive defense to preemptive security operations, featuring sessions on AI-driven threat hunting and autonomous…
